ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Il secondo libro de le lettere di M. Pietro Aretino.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Aretino Congratulates with Orsini for the foundation of the Academy. As for the printer, Bertolo proposes that the books was printed by English typographers who used Wolfe`s material, after his death. See Bertolo, `John Wolfe`, in Rinascimento Italiano davanti alla Riforma (Vecchiarelli, 2004).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
